heading: Mourilyan vs Mourilyan Harbour — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mourilyan, Queensland and Mourilyan Harbour, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mourilyan Harbour has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Mourilyan (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mourilyan or Mourilyan Harbour safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mourilyan has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Mourilyan Harbour scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mourilyan scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Mourilyan Harbour scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mourilyan or Mourilyan Harbour?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mourilyan Harbour has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
